zh.lifeSummary: Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer是Hans Jacob Schäfer和Elisabeth的兒子，於1652年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯孔特維。他於1680年2月24日與Anna Apollonia Weber在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1712年5月13日在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer是Hans Jacob Schäfer和Elisabeth的儿子，于1652年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 皮爾馬森斯孔特維。他于1680年2月24日与Anna Apollonia Weber在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1712年5月13日在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schäfer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pastor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Jose, Luis, Mario, Fernando, Mariano, Pedro, Ricardo, Santiago, Sergio, Alfonso.

English, French, Portuguese, Galician, Spanish, and Catalan: occupational name for a shepherd, Anglo-Norman French pastre (oblique case pastour), Old French, Portuguese, Galician, Spanish, and Catalan pastor ‘shepherd’, from Latin pastor, an agent derivative of pascere ‘to graze’. The religious sense of a spiritual leader was rare in the Middle Ages; it is unlikely, therefore, that this sense lies behind any examples of the surname.
German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of German Schäfer (see Schafer ) or any other surname meaning ‘shepherd’. Compare Pastorius .

variants.name: Pastorius
meanings: German: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of Schäfer (see Schafer ) or any other surname meaning ‘shepherd’. Compare Pastor . This surname is not found in Germany, anymore.

History: Franz (Francis) Daniel Pastorius (1651–1719), from Sommershausen near Frankfurt, Germany, was the leader of a group of Mennonites who arrived in Philadelphia, PA, in 1683, one of the earliest German-speaking groups of immigrants to North America. Under his leadership plans were made for the city of Germantown, PA, of which he became mayor in 1691. He was one of the signers of the first Quaker protest against slavery in America.

variants.name: Schaefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Hans, Gerhard, Helmut, Dieter, Wolfgang, Hermann, Horst, Manfred.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäfer): occupational name for a shepherd, from an agent derivative of German Schaf, Middle High German schāf ‘sheep’. It is also found in Hungary and Czechia. Compare Schafer and Schaffer 2.

nameMeanings.name: Zacharias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the New Testament Greek name Zacharias, a form of Hebrew Zechariah ‘God has remembered’. This was the name of the father of John the Baptist, who underwent a temporary period of dumbness for his lack of faith (Luke 1), and of a more obscure figure, Zacharias son of Barachias, who was slain ‘between the temple and the altar’ (Matthew 23:35; Luke 11:51). In the United States it is familiar as the name of a 19th-century president, Zachary Taylor . Since the 1990s the name has been remarkably popular in the English-speaking world, especially in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer was born in 1652, in Contwig, Pirmasens, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany as the son of Hans Jacob Schäfer and Elisabeth. He married Anna Apollonia Weber on 24 February 1680, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 13 May 1712, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

Il a épousé Anna Apollonia Weber le 24 février 1680, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mai 1712, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ko.Burgalben, Südwest-Pfalz, Rheinland-Pfal: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 월드피슈바ch-버갤벤 버갤벤
ko.lifeSummary: Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer(은)는 1652년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 피마센스 콘트위그에서 Hans Jacob Schäfer(와)과 Elisabeth의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1680년 2월 24일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Anna Apollonia Weber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1712년 5월 13일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer nasceu em 1652, em Contwig, Landkreis Pirmasens, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha filho de Hans Jacob Schäfer e Elisabeth. Ele casou-se com Anna Apollonia Weber em 24 de fevereiro de 1680, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de maio de 1712, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Johann or Hanss Zacharias Schäfer родился в 1652 г. в местности контвиг, ландкрис пирмеисенс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Его родителей звали Hans Jacob Schäfer и Elisabeth. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Apollonia Weber 24 февраля 1680 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 мая 1712 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Anna Apollonia Weber el 24 de febrero de 1680, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de mayo de 1712, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
